top_signals.title: New Zealand’s Penk on Hormuz Uncertainty (Video) (Correct)
top_signals.summary: New Zealand’s Defense Minister Chris Penk speaks to Bloomberg TV about how the Iran war is shaping his country’s security outlook, and the importance of freedom of navigation through the seas. He speaks with Bloomberg’s Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue. (Corrects name of interviewee.) (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
